About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Trip Butler: From 0 to 1, the Evolution of Smart Travel.
About.description: We are dedicated to combining AI technology with local expertise to provide deeply personalized travel experiences for every traveler.

timeline.title: Project Launch & Foundation
timeline.content: Officially kicked off Trip Butler. Established Next.js core, integrated Supabase, and completed the foundation for multilingual support (ZH/EN/JA).

timeline.title: AI Travel Brain: Planner Launch
timeline.content: Released the AI Smart Planner. Used multi-dimensional questionnaires to capture preferences and implemented dynamic itinerary generation.

timeline.title: Cloud Sync & Security Hardening
timeline.content: Migrated from local storage to Supabase Cloud Sync. Added user profile management (Phone/OTP) and itinerary limit protection.

timeline.title: Admin Command Center
timeline.content: Established the backoffice system with permission-based access, system audit logs, and hierarchical admin management.

timeline.title: Landmark Encyclopedia & Discovery
timeline.content: Integrated a real-world site database for major cities. Added 'Explore Landmarks' to allow instant additions to journeys.

timeline.title: Smart Matching & UX Refinement
timeline.content: Implemented automated guide matching and quotation flow. Redesigned itinerary cards to 'Timeline Style' and improved global accessibility.

Home.title: Deep Customized Travel,
Home.subtitle: Matched with Precision.
Home.description: The platform built for families and friends seeking customized fine travel, finding vetted expert guides for truly unique experiences.
Home.escrowDesc: Your funds are held safely in escrow and only released when you are satisfied with your trip.
Home.escrowDetail: We utilize industry-leading third-party fund management technology. After you confirm your itinerary with a guide, the funds are held in a protected escrow account. The system only releases payment once the guide has completed the service and you provide satisfaction confirmation. This fully eliminates the risk of paying in advance and not receiving service.
Home.commDesc: Chat directly with your guide to plan every detail of your itinerary before booking.
Home.commDetail: You can talk directly with guides through our encrypted messaging system. Discuss everything from dietary requirements and luggage count to hidden local spots before confirming your booking. A transparent communication environment helps you understand your guide's style and ensures a perfect match from the start.
Home.expertDesc: Browse through vetted guides with specialized expertise in local culture, food, and family needs.
Home.expertDetail: Every guide joining Trip Butler undergoes rigorous background checks and professional competency tests. We don't just verify licenses; we look deep into their knowledge of historic sites, local cuisine, and niche interests like photography or hiking. Find the perfect professional butler based on specialized tags.
Home.smartDesc: Leverage AI to craft personalized itineraries that dynamically adjust based on your preferences.
Home.smartDetail: Trip Butler's Smart Itinerary system combines powerful LLM models with the real-world experience of local guides. Simply input your preferences, and the system generates a draft considering transit routes, opening hours, and weather forecasts within seconds, which is then refined by experts for a perfect plan.

kyoto.name: Kyoto, Japan
kyoto.desc: Wander through ancient streets and thousand-year-old temples, experiencing the pinnacle of Japanese aesthetics.
kyoto.tips: Best Seasons: Spring Cherry Blossoms & Autumn Leaves. Must-try: Local tea ceremonies and Kaiseki cuisine.

paris.name: Paris, France
paris.desc: Find artistic inspiration in the city of romance, from the Eiffel Tower to hidden alley cafes.
paris.tips: Best Season: Early Summer. Must-try: Seine River strolls and guided Louvre tours.

bali.name: Bali, Indonesia
bali.desc: Find peace in a tropical paradise, enjoying stunning beaches and Ubud's terraced rice fields.
bali.tips: Best Season: April to October (Dry Season). Must-try: Jungle swings and traditional fire dances.

taipei.name: Taipei, Taiwan
taipei.desc: Feel the blend of a bustling metropolis and traditional markets, tasting world-renowned local cuisine.
taipei.tips: Best Season: Autumn. Must-try: Taipei 101 views and Raohe Night Market.
